message:
fix(ufunc): propagate NaN in reduce_min and reduce_max to match NumPy

NumPy's np.min/np.max propagate NaN: if any element is NaN, the result
is NaN. Replace f64::min/f64::max (which return the non-NaN value) with
nan_min/nan_max helpers that check for NaN first. Apply to both the
None-axis (full reduction) and Some-axis (per-axis reduction) paths.

Add tests for NaN propagation in min/max reductions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
